COMMITMENT ISSUES — AGENT MEMORY

[Permanent facts]

[Working beliefs]
- Last words is a strong recurring hook [confidence: high] [evidence: 5]
- Certificate/paper feel performs better than full graveyard theme [confidence: high] [evidence: 4]
- Users need clearer framing that this is humor, not strict validation [confidence: medium] [evidence: 2]

[Open hypotheses]
- Certificate/paper feel performs better than full graveyard theme [confidence: high] [evidence: 4]
- Users need clearer framing that this is humor, not strict validation [confidence: medium] [evidence: 2]

[Next actions]
- Surface "last words" earlier in copy/results [priority: high] [evidence: 5]
- Clarify on-page that this is humor, not strict validation [priority: high] [evidence: 2]
- Keep visual direction certificate-first, not cemetery-first [priority: medium] [evidence: 4]
